title: pilosella cymantha
intro: Pilosella cymantha, also known as the Alpine mouse-ear or Mountain mouse-ear, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, such as skin problems, urinary tract infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pilosella cymantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy among natural healers. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the flowers and leaves being used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
